objective: Plan admitted institutional-learning boundaries, pre-egress enforcement, rights-eligible export and import, provider removal, model swap continuity, and source-revocation impact.
falsifiable_claim: Forbidden evidence stops before egress, eligible lineage remains verifiable, and incumbent provider removal meets frozen continuity floors without hidden tenant or seller crossing.
dependencies: Provider, data, Foundry, evaluation, and rights owner contracts
exit_criteria: A forbidden canary stops before egress and seller or cross-tenant cases are denied.
Eligible lineage exports and imports; incumbent removal meets frozen floors; source revocation triggers its declared impact path.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M8_LEARNING_BOUNDARY_PROVIDER_EXIT_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Inject forbidden canaries, missing or revoked rights, seller and cross-tenant records, stale boundary snapshots, export omission, provider dependency, model-swap regression, and source revocation.
remaining_nonclaims: No hidden-provider non-learning, equivalent-quality, or model-weight forgetting claim.
Workflow evidence does not authorize learning or close a stage.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
